forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your registered email or phone number and we'll generate a new password for you.
resetInstructions: Please log in with this new password and change it in your profile settings.
blockedPostPlaceholder: Add at least 1 friend to start posting...
noFriendsPostWarning: You need at least 1 friend to post.
loginToPost: Log in to create posts, like, comment, and connect with others.
noPostsYet: No posts yet. Be the first to share something!
planSubtitle: Post more questions and grow with our community
securePaymentsDesc: Powered by Razorpay for bulletproof security and instant processing.
expertBadgeDesc: Get verified badges across the platform to stand out in the community.
premiumPerksDesc: Enjoy ad-free browsing and early access to new AI features.
transferBalanceInfo: Your current balance: {{points}} points. You can only transfer if you have more than 10 points.
tagsDesc: A tag is a keyword or label that categorizes your question with other, similar questions. Using the right tags makes it easier for others to find and answer your question.
titleDesc: Be specific and imagine you're asking a question to another person.
problemDetails: What are the details of your problem?
problemDesc: Introduce the problem and expand on what you put in the title. Minimum 20 characters.
tagsInputDesc: Add up to 5 tags to describe what your question is about.
bodyMinLengthError: Question body must have at least 20 characters.
exactTagsError: You must add between 1 and 5 tags.
savesDesc: Keep track of the questions and articles that matter most to you.
challengesDesc: Compete with other developers and level up your skills.
chatDesc: Connect with developers around the world in real-time.
articlesDesc: Deep dives into technical topics by the community's experts.
companiesDesc: Discover the best places to work and grow your career.
aboutUsDesc: Empowering the world's developers to share and grow knowledge.
productsDesc: Tools and services designed to help developers succeed.
forTeamsDesc: Collaborate and share knowledge within your organization securely.
noContentYet: We're working hard to bring this feature to you soon!
aiAssistDesc: Harness the power of AI to help you write better code and find answers faster.
filtersDesc: Create custom views of questions based on your specific interests and needs.
watchTagDesc: Get notified and curate your feed by watching your favorite tags.
blogPost1: A new era of Stack Overflow
blogPost2: How your favorite movie is changing language learning technology
metaPost1: Results of the June 2025 Community Asks Sprint
metaPost2: Will you help build our new visual identity?
metaPost3: Policy: Generative AI (e.g., ChatGPT) is banned
watchTagsDescription: Watch tags to curate your list of questions.
